channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Will Strategy's Peers Dump Bitcoin Now? Not so Fast, Analysts Say
item.description: Crypto analysts say investors should look closely at each company's financial situation rather than expecting a cascade of incoming sales.

item.title: Bitcoin faces an 'identity crisis' and DeFi devs need to stop acting like tech bros
item.description: Solstice Labs CEO Ben Nadareski says developers must act like financial managers to win back institutional trust amid ongoing security exploits.

item.title: Hyperliquid predicted 80% of oil move before traditional exchanges opened, says expert report
item.description: TD Securities says "perpetual futures" are exploding beyond crypto as platforms like Hyperliquid outpace traditional Wall Street exchanges on everything from pre-IPO tech stocks to weekend oil trading.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: JUST IN: Bitcoin crashes under $67,000 $700,000,000 liquidated from the crypto market in the past 2 hours. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBMMU1kUjdXMXRuODFJWURqOXluSjRrdGhUd2tqdUZma0pDcW9pelY1b1BjdWViY0tBM1JXYkpVQlBVWklKYlhoWVdFdzdKbnRIYURESFpQVUVPMExWUDFCRmpn?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Bitcoin crashes under $67…

item.title: Here's how one decentralized cloud provider says private citizens can make money from AI
item.description: Titan Network says its crowdsourced computing network has signed tech giants like Tencent and Alibaba as clients, saving them as much 75% on AI costs.

item.title: Bitcoin Traders Flip Bearish as BTC Falls to Lowest Price in Months
item.description: Myriad predictors think it's increasingly likely that Bitcoin's next stop is $55,000 rather than $84,000 as BTC continues its slide.

item.title: Anthropic Expands Access to Claude Mythos After AI Giant Files for IPO
item.description: Just a day after the nearly $1 trillion AI giant revealed IPO plans, Anthropic is letting more firms access its powerful Claude Mythos model.

item.title: Zama accelerates compliance after court lifts $12.5M USDC freeze
item.description: Privacy protocol Zama says it will accelerate compliance measures after a court lifted a $12.5 million USDC freeze tied to an unrelated legal dispute.

item.title: Gary Vaynerchuk says AI is creating the biggest opportunity ever for entrepreneurs
item.description: AI is reshaping business faster than most leaders realize, and Gary Vaynerchuk argues the biggest winners will be creative builders willing to adapt.

item.title: Hyperliquid is beating ethereum in trading volume on some days as big money rotates, says FalconX
item.description: Institutional investors are ditching range-bound bitcoin and ether for Hyperliquid as the decentralized platform wins over hedge funds with massive liquidity and early access to hot markets, according to Joshua Lim, head of markets at Falc…

item.title: Georgia targets illegal crypto mining in Mestia crackdown: Report
item.description: Georgia will reportedly install electricity meters across Mestia to curb illegal crypto mining after officials blamed miners for grid strain and outages.

item.title: Solana Now Has Native Subscriptions & Allowances
item.description: Recurring payments and delegated spending are now available as a shared onchain primitive, and teams are already building on it.

item.title: Kaiko acquires Amberdata in blockchain data consolidation push
item.description: Kaiko acquired Amberdata to expand its institutional crypto data platform with derivatives analytics, onchain tools and AI-powered research.

item.title: JUST IN: $320,000,000 worth of crypto longs liquidated in the past 60 minutes. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBLaW8zU1lSMGF3LUdMem94T0J0b1Y2STd4UmNjZ3dNalprSy1RLVZVc25LWG1Xa2szVkRDMFVRN2tKdmlLU05GMGUzNXRvY2FmM1YybzM1VTVSNFhBOFE1QzBB?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: $320,000,000 worth of cry…

item.title: JUST IN: Bitcoin crashes under $68,000 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9IR1BTelVyazRRLXpPRW44UjFSSXpuQW9tQWNGNTZmdloyNlp2SS1qYlJXNjBjZG5LblZQMTVJUjdqTFNCeHg3bF9KbGQ0aXlQdmRPWk1PSGZuV1ZHZlh6TU1n?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Bitcoin crashes under $68…

item.title: Andrew Yang's Noble Acquires Crypto-Fueled Helium Mobile Service
item.description: Crypto-powered cell service Helium Mobile has been acquired by Andrew Yang's Noble, which will also utilize the underlying Helium network.

item.title: HIVE Bitcoin holdings drop by 331 BTC in Q1, reports record $298M revenue
item.description: HIVE reduced its Bitcoin holdings to 150 BTC while annual revenue climbed to $297.8 million, driven by growth in mining and AI computing.

item.title: How to better understand bitcoin’s perpetual identity crisis
item.description: Here, Bailey unpacks the uncertainty surrounding the original cryptocurrency’s nature, which creates inconsistent market behavior.

item.title: How high can NEAR price go in June?
item.description: NEAR has rebounded from a key historical support zone, reviving a bullish fractal that preceded 2,375% and 900% rallies in previous cycles.

item.title: Trader says XRP price setting ‘biggest bear trap’ after June monthly open
item.description: XRP trades below key macro support, but analysts say reclaiming it could trigger one of the biggest bear traps.

item.title: Franklin Templeton teams up with MoonPay to let big investors swap stablecoins for yields 24/7
item.description: The Wall Street giant is integrating its tech platform with MoonPay's infrastructure, allowing eligible institutions to seamlessly swap stablecoins for yield-generating tokenized funds without ever leaving the blockchain.

item.title: MoneyGram launches MGUSD stablecoin on Stellar network
item.description: MoneyGram launched MGUSD, a dollar stablecoin on Stellar, as the remittance company deepens its push into blockchain-based global payments.

item.title: Mt. Gox Moves $739M in Bitcoin as Repayment Deadline Looms
item.description: The defunct exchange still has about 35,000 BTC left to distribute, though the latest transfer does not show a sale.

item.title: Strategy's bitcoin sale may mark start of ether outperformance, StanChart's Kendrick says
item.description: ETH could outperform BTC by 40% from current levels as bitcoin treasuries may sell assets to cover obligations, the bank's digital asset research head said.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Stellar (XLM) falls 8.4%, leading index lower
item.description: Aave (AAVE), down 3.9% from Monday, was also an underperformer.

item.title: Movement pivots to stablecoin payments as the layer-2 boom loses momentum
item.description: The team behind Movement said it plans to leverage licensed payment partners alongside blockchain settlement rails to target the roughly $685 billion remittance market serving low and middle-income countries.

item.title: EdgeX blames ‘external party’ for token crash as ZachXBT alleges insider manipulation
item.description: Onchain investigator ZachXBT claims decentralized exchange edgeX insiders controlled nearly the entire supply with a thin float.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Vivek Ramaswamy's 'Strive' buys 2,500 Bitcoin worth $185 million. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFB6M1ZtbFhUWnp3akdyTmVoc1pDTkhhUmtoc2sxWVY0cVU2andmcDdtS0h6OTRZSkd0dW1fUTlMaUpuLVJqQWVxaEVOQVFndnB4RWE3MnoxMHBnUVhabnJRa1NB?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Vivek Ramaswamy's 'S…

item.title: NEAR, Worldcoin Post Double-Digit Gains as Market Sees $714M in Liquidations
item.description: While Bitcoin dipped below $70,000 to trigger a massive liquidation cascade, select altcoins surged on individual ecosystem catalysts.

item.title: Live markets: bitcoin's plunge continues, putting February $60,000 low back in play
item.description: Google overnight set an $80 billion capital raise, including $10 billion from Berkshire Hathaway, reflecting the continuing flood of money headed into AI (and not crypto).

item.title: Capital B seeks $122B funding mandate to buy more Bitcoin
item.description: Capital B is asking shareholders to approve up to $122 billion in capital-raising authority to accelerate its Bitcoin treasury strategy.

item.title: Stellar CEO says Clarity Act would help, but tokenization isn't dependent on it
item.description: DTCC’s decision to connect its tokenized securities platform to Stellar marks a new phase of institutional adoption for public blockchains.

item.title: Strive added 2,500 bitcoin last week to reach 19,000 BTC as Strategy sold
item.description: Benchmark's Mark Palmer also initiated coverage of the stock with a Buy rating and $32 price target as ASST shares fell about 4% pre-market.

item.title: Bitcoin ETF outflows are noise as Wall Street doubles down on crypto, says analyst
item.description: Recent Bitcoin ETF outflows look dramatic in headlines, but Bloomberg Intelligence's Eric Balchunas says the broader adoption story remains intact.

item.title: Morning Minute: Saylor Sells Bitcoin for First Time Since 2022
item.description: Bitcoin fell below $70K on the back of the sales, and a major Polymarket dispute is brewing over whether Strategy indeed sold in May or not.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Public company Strive purchases 2,500 Bitcoin for $185.2 million! 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE5EbkNvUXZHS1dWaG9pME9xS3N0bTJLUDVMYXdJWHB3T3JyNWNwZWhjbU1wQ0dvWFRXc2NtUy1jaXFJQU1KSEtKelB5VXpDMVNRaURKRk0xUlRRcWk2emxxaUVVUFJRSTA?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Public compan…

item.title: Bitcoin derivatives markets flashing warning signs as price plunges below $70,000
item.description: Open interest has risen to 773,000 BTC, one of the highest readings on record, while funding rates remain elevated despite weak spot demand and growing market fear.

item.title: Tom Lee calls Strategy's bitcoin sale classic 'bottom behavior'
item.description: Bitmine Immersion Technologies chairman said minor sales from key holders and institutional outflows are typical market bottom behaviors rather than structural threats.

item.title: Symbiotic aims to make tokenized assets easier to cash out with new liquidity network
item.description: Liquid Lane aims to solve a key bottleneck that is holding back growth of tokenized funds and credit: long redemption times, Symbiotic cofounder Misha Putiatin said.

item.title: Ripple’s dollar stablecoin expands to Turkey through three local platforms
item.description: BiLira, Bitexen and Bitlo will make Ripple’s RLUSD stablecoin available to Turkish institutions.

item.title: Bitcoin's slide may have more to do with AI than Strategy
item.description: Your day-ahead look for June 2, 2026

item.title: Bitcoin back in ‘distribution phase’ as extreme fear grips crypto market
item.description: Bitcoin slips below $70,000 as rising losses, exchange inflows and extreme fear signal a renewed distribution phase.

item.title: Crypto treasury inflows fall to lowest level since 2024
item.description: Bitcoin treasury firms made up nearly all May inflows, but BTC-linked capital formation also dropped sharply from April.

item.title: Bitcoin drops toward $69,000 as Saylor sale spooks investors while AI tokens buck the trend
item.description: The price of bitcoin fell to its lowest since April 7 as Strategy's sale dented sentiment, while AI tokens H and NEAR surged and DeFi TVL hit a 20-month low.

item.title: Mt. Gox moves $739M in Bitcoin from cold wallets: Arkham
item.description: Mt. Gox moved $739 million in Bitcoin for the first time since March, raising speculation about imminent creditor distributions.

item.title: Bitcoin price falls under $70K as crypto markets liquidate $800M
item.description: Bitcoin fell to fresh two-month lows as BTC price weakness accelerated and analysis targeted its 200-day moving average trend line.

item.title: Robinhood enters Canada after $180 million WonderFi acquisition
item.description: Robinhood will enter Canada after its WonderFi acquisition brought local crypto exchanges Bitbuy and Coinsquare under its control.

item.title: The first looks of a potential downtrend for the #Bitcoin dominance have started. It's making a lower high and a strong downwards move as $ETH starts to outperform Bitcoin. That looks to be the case that we're going to be seeing a lot of momentum into the altc - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9yS3VEcDhmRnRKd0RZZnlwQUpWNENrdW5jTFN3S1FIZ2FFY1lvdzJSMUpwTGJTLS1kNUZZSjdaSGpTbHV2d19LWlA3NDVqS2dQQ1EzQkVVNnRHUE93aUpNUVFsWQ?oc=5" target="_blank">The first looks of a potential d…

item.title: Bitcoin falls to 2-month low as divergence from equities widens
item.description: Santiment says that “the gap between traditional equities and crypto has become increasingly difficult for traders to ignore.”

item.title: A major step forward for crypto in the UAE 🇦🇪 We’re enabling seamless movement between fiat and crypto: simple, secure, and efficient. Zero-fee AED deposits, withdrawals fixed at 10 AED, and faster transfers. Setting a new standard for access. 👉 binance.co - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9pd3ZyZm9HRVVzRHAyZUxnZ0dqRTZpV2JlN2V1UUwta2RWTThKWmJFZmpOOUc1Mm9YQWJuOTBpMVZjem9WbFdaQ0lXWXZLb3l0Zm9xNWY4M2JOYUVWaHdmSHN1VQ?oc=5" target="_blank">A major step forward for crypto …

item.title: Grayscale HYPE ETF ‘likely imminent’ as new update shows competitive fee: Analyst
item.description: Grayscale proposed a fee of 0.29% on its Hyperliquid ETF, which “slightly undercuts” rivals 21Shares and Bitwise that carry respective fees of 0.3% and 0.34%, says analyst James Seyffart.

item.title: ALERT: MT GOX MOVED $739 MILLION bitcoin:native - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE5hQ3ZXX3J3WDVRNzEzX2xmcDlVUm9DMWhPT2JkQk16WmRyQmI3bVp1S3V2VFloOXpYOTdXTWgxUFBjSWNHdTk0WUZFM0pCZDJ5aUNuRnhiNlpKZm8?oc=5" target="_blank">ALERT: MT GOX MOVED $739 MILLION bitcoin:na…

item.title: TON jumps 15% as The Open Network plans rebrand to Gram
item.description: Telegram founder Pavel Durov says it is “returning to our roots — and starting a new chapter” by rebranding Toncoin to Gram.

item.title: Bitmine buys $52M ETH as Tom Lee says price not yet showing Ethereum’s strength
item.description: Bitmine is aiming to hold 5% of the total circulating supply of 120.6 million Ether tokens and is about 90% of the way to its target after its latest purchase.

item.title: Strategy’s Bitcoin sale causes clash for $80M in Polymarket bets
item.description: A clash has erupted among Polymarket users over the timing and disclosure of a recent Bitcoin sale by Strategy, with more than $80 million traded on the disputed outcome.

item.title: Nvidia Releases Its Best Open AI Model Yet—But Still Lags Behind China
item.description: Nvidia's Nemotron 3 Ultra tops every American open-weight AI system by a wide margin—but still trails the Chinese-led frontier.

item.title: DuckDuckGo Launched Duck AI. Now Their Hit Product is 'No AI'
item.description: As Google buries its search results under AI-generated answers, DuckDuckGo believes a growing number of users just want the old internet back.

item.title: TON Price Pumps After Telegram CEO Says Token Will Be Rebranded to Gram
item.description: Telegram is taking the reins of The Open Network, years after abandoning the project—and it plans to adopt Toncoin's originally planned name.

item.title: I think this is the next big thing in crypto. If you talk to any S&P 500 company and ask them, "Are you planning to use blockchain technology to manage inventory, provide logistics, contract management, et cetera, et cetera?" They all say yes. So I think the next b - x.com
